data.name: Auth_UserNotFound
data.value: User not found. Please sign up first.

data.name: Auth_EmailCodeDisabled
data.value: Email code authentication is not enabled for this account. Please use password to sign in.

data.name: Auth_NoEmail
data.value: No email address associated with this account. Please use password to sign in.

data.name: Auth_FailedToGenerateCode
data.value: Failed to generate code. Please try again.

data.name: Auth_InvalidOtp
data.value: Invalid or expired verification code.

data.name: Auth_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email/username or password.

data.name: Auth_PasswordNotEnabled
data.value: Password authentication is not enabled for this account.

data.name: Auth_SessionExpired
data.value: Session expired or invalid. Please sign in again.

data.name: Auth_DbError
data.value: A database error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Auth_OtpSent
data.value: OTP sent to email

data.name: Auth_RegistrationSuccess
data.value: Registration successful

data.name: Auth_VerificationSent
data.value: Verification code sent to your email

data.name: Auth_SignOutSuccess
data.value: Signed out successfully

data.name: Reg_UsernameTaken
data.value: Username already taken. Please choose a different username.

data.name: Reg_EmailTaken
data.value: Email already registered.

data.name: Reg_VerificationFailed
data.value: Invalid or expired verification code.

data.name: Reg_Expired
data.value: Registration session expired. Please start registration again.

data.name: Reg_Failed
data.value: Registration failed. Please try again.

data.name: Reg_PendingFailed
data.value: Failed to create registration. Please try again.

data.name: Reg_CodeFailed
data.value: Failed to generate verification code. Please try again.

data.name: Val_UsernameInvalid
data.value: Invalid username. Must be 3-50 characters: Latin letters, numbers, and spaces only.

data.name: Val_PasswordInvalid
data.value: Invalid password. Must be 6-100 characters, no spaces, Latin letters/numbers/special chars only.

data.name: Val_EmailInvalid
data.value: Invalid email address. Please enter a valid email.

data.name: Profile_NotFound
data.value: User not found

data.name: Profile_UsernameUpdated
data.value: Username updated successfully

data.name: Profile_UsernameTaken
data.value: Username already taken

data.name: Profile_UpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update. Please try again.

data.name: Profile_InvalidAuthMethod
data.value: Invalid authentication method

data.name: Profile_AuthMethodUpdated
data.value: Authentication method updated successfully

data.name: Profile_PasswordUpdated
data.value: Password updated successfully

data.name: Profile_EmailUpdated
data.value: Email updated successfully

data.name: Profile_VerificationSent
data.value: Verification code sent to your new email

data.name: Profile_VerificationFailed
data.value: Verification failed. Please try again.

data.name: Profile_LanguageUpdated
data.value: Language updated successfully

data.name: Profile_IdentityVerificationFailed
data.value: Identity verification failed. Please check your credentials.

data.name: Profile_PasswordSetupSent
data.value: Password setup code sent to your email

data.name: Profile_PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: Passwords do not match

data.name: Profile_PasswordRequired
data.value: New password is required

data.name: Profile_NeedPasswordFirst
data.value: You must set a password first before enabling password sign-in

data.name: Profile_NeedEmailFirst
data.value: You must set an email first before enabling email sign-in

data.name: Profile_OldPasswordRequired
data.value: Current password is required

data.name: Profile_OldPasswordIncorrect
data.value: Current password is incorrect

data.name: Profile_OtpRequired
data.value: Verification code is required to set up password

data.name: Profile_NoEmailForSetup
data.value: No email address set. Please add an email first.

data.name: Profile_PasswordAuthDisabled
data.value: Password authentication is not enabled for your account. Please use the verification code sent to your email.

data.name: Profile_NoPasswordSet
data.value: No password is set for your account. Please use the verification code sent to your email.

data.name: Profile_EmailAuthDisabled
data.value: Email code authentication is not enabled for your account. Please use your password.

data.name: Profile_NoEmailSet
data.value: No email is set for your account. Please use your password.

data.name: Profile_ProvidePasswordOrCode
data.value: Please provide your password or verification code

data.name: Profile_ProvidePassword
data.value: Please provide your password

data.name: Profile_ProvideCode
data.value: Please provide the verification code

data.name: Profile_InvalidLanguage
data.value: Invalid language code. Supported: en, fr, ru

data.name: Favorites_LimitReached
data.value: You can only have up to 5 favorite seasons

data.name: Favorites_AlreadyFavorited
data.value: Season is already in your favorites

data.name: Favorites_NotFound
data.value: Season not found

data.name: Favorites_AddFailed
data.value: Failed to add favorite season

data.name: Favorites_Added
data.value: Season added to favorites

data.name: Favorites_RemoveFailed
data.value: Failed to remove favorite season

data.name: Favorites_Removed
data.value: Season removed from favorites

data.name: Admin_SetActiveFailed
data.value: Failed to set active season. Season may not exist.

data.name: Admin_SetActiveSuccess
data.value: Season activated successfully. Other seasons in this series have been deactivated.

data.name: Admin_Unauthorized
data.value: Admin access required

data.name: General_NotFound
data.value: Not found

data.name: General_Failed
data.value: Operation failed. Please try again.

data.name: General_Success
data.value: Operation completed successfully

data.name: Email_Subject
data.value: Your Verification Code for YouCent Podium

data.name: Email_Header
data.value: YouCent Podium

data.name: Email_Title
data.value: Your Verification Code

data.name: Email_Body
data.value: Use this code to sign in to your Podium account:

data.name: Email_Expiry
data.value: This code expires in 10 minutes.

data.name: Email_Ignore
data.value: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

data.name: Email_Automated
data.value: This is an automated message, please do not reply.

data.name: Email_Copyright
data.value: All rights reserved.
